RESIDENTIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

Landlord:
Fairview Holdings LLC

Tenant:
Alex Chen

1. Term. Twelve-month fixed term beginning September 1, 2026. This lease shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless either party gives 60 days' written notice.

2. Renewal Cap. In the event of automatic renewal, any rent increase shall not exceed 5% of the prior year's rent.

3. Security Deposit. Tenant shall pay a security deposit equal to two months rent, in the amount of $3,600, refundable at move-out subject to normal wear and tear.

4. Rent. Monthly Rent: $1,800.00, due on the first of each month.

5. Late Fee. A late fee of 3% will apply to any rent payment received after the 3-day grace period.

6. Entry. Tenant shall be given 24 hours notice prior to any entry by the Landlord, except in cases of emergency.
